about.origin.label: Origin
about.origin.title: The Name AKIS
about.origin.subtitle: AKIS comes from the intersection of two ideas:
about.origin.echo.title: "Akis" — Echo & Reflection
about.origin.echo.body: The platform reflects the team's intent, decisions and code back as documentation, tests and prototypes.
about.origin.flow.title: "Akış" — Flow State
about.origin.flow.body: The flow state where developers do meaningful work without interruption.
about.origin.closing: AKIS exists to return teams to that flow by eliminating repetitive SDLC tasks.
about.vision.label: Vision
about.vision.quote: To give development teams their time back by empowering them with transparent, reliable AI agents that keep them in flow.
about.vision.body1: AKIS aims for a future where software teams no longer get stuck in repetitive documentation, testing, or MVP scaffolding. Instead, they focus on architecture, design and problem-solving.
about.vision.body2: This is achieved through transparent, auditable and trustworthy agents that integrate naturally into GitHub, Jira and Confluence.
about.mission.label: Mission
about.mission.quote: To automate repetitive parts of the SDLC with transparent, controllable AI agents — so teams can ship faster, more consistently and with greater confidence.
about.mission.items.engine: Deliver an AI Agent Workflow Engine that sits on top of Git-native workflows.
about.mission.items.scribe: AKIS Scribe → Converts code changes into living documentation.
about.mission.items.trace: AKIS Trace → Generates structured test assets from issue trackers.
about.mission.items.proto: AKIS Proto → Turns requirements into rapid MVPs.
about.mission.items.logs: Every agent runs with transparent logs, explainable actions and playbook-driven behavior.
about.lineup.label: Agent Lineup
about.lineup.headline: Three Agents. Infinite Productivity.
about.lineup.scribe.title: AKIS Scribe
about.lineup.scribe.subtitle: Documentation Automation
about.lineup.trace.title: AKIS Trace
about.lineup.trace.subtitle: Test Automation
about.lineup.proto.title: AKIS Proto
about.lineup.proto.subtitle: MVP Acceleration
about.closing.text: AKIS is more than a tool. It's a philosophy: let AI handle the repetitive, so developers can focus on what matters.
